bids.reasoning: I am targeting maximum utility at the opening because time pressure is nonexistent at t=0.00, and the opponent’s first offer gives me the minimum value on every issue. Their message demands concession, but the actual offer shows no concession from them, so I will start with my strongest valid bid.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still the opening phase at t=0.02, and the opponent has not made any numerical concession from their all-valueE demand. Their messages ask for a substantial concession, but the offer history shows they are holding firm, so I will make only a small concession on a low-weight issue while preserving my most important issues.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.96 because it is still very early (t=0.04), so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent’s offers have improved only slightly for me, from all valueE to issueA:valueD while everything else remains valueE, so their aggressive messages are not backed by much numerical concession. I will concede on lower-weight issues D and E first while holding firm on the highest-weight issues A and B.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.94 while making a small additional concession to show movement. The opponent has only conceded slightly on issueA and otherwise keeps offering valueE across the board, while their aggressive messages are cheap talk; I will hold firm on high-weight issueA/issueB/issueC and concede first on low-weight issueE.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.92 because it is still very early (t=0.08), so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent’s offers remain very unfavorable to me, with only small movement from all valueE to one issue at valueD, and their aggressive messages are cheap talk rather than evidence of real limits. I will continue conceding first on lower-weight issues while holding firm on the most important issues A, B, and C.

I am targeting about 0.90 utility because it is still early at t=0.10, so I should not concede heavily despite the opponent’s aggressive messages. The opponent’s actual bids have improved only modestly for me, from 0.20 to about 0.32 utility, so I will make another small concession on a low-weight issue while holding firm on the most important issues A, B, and C.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.86 because it is still very early at t=0.12, but I am making a meaningful concession beyond my prior offers by moving issueC down to valueB. The opponent’s messages are aggressive cheap talk, but their actual offers show only limited concession so far, improving my utility from 0.20 to about 0.32; I will therefore hold firm on the highest-weight issues A and B while conceding on lower/mid-weight issues.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.84 because it is still early at t=0.14, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent’s offers are improving only slightly for me and remain very low on issueC/issueD/issueE, while their messages are aggressive but not binding; I will concede further on low-weight issueE while holding firm on the high-weight issueA and issueB.

I am targeting about 0.82 utility, which is a meaningful but still early-stage concession from my prior bid while preserving my highest-weight issues A and B. The opponent’s offers remain very unfavorable to me overall, though they have shown some movement on issueA and issueB; their messages are aggressive but not enough to justify large concessions this early at t=0.16. I am therefore conceding further on a low-weight issue first.

I am targeting a utility around 0.78, making a moderate early concession while still protecting the highest-weight issues A and B. The opponent’s offers have improved only slightly for me and remain low-utility, while their messages are mostly pressure tactics, so I will concede on issueC and keep prior concessions on lower-weight issues rather than moving on the most important issues.

I am targeting about 0.76 utility, which is a meaningful concession from my earlier bids while still protecting the high-weight issues A and B at this early time point. The opponent’s offers have improved somewhat for me, especially on issueA and issueB, but they remain very low on issueC–E; their messages are aggressive cheap talk, so I rely more on the actual bids than the wording. I concede further on the lower-weight issueE while keeping the main value concentrated in the most important issues.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.72, since it is early enough at t=0.22 to protect the high-weight issues but late enough to keep making visible concessions. The opponent’s actual offers remain low-value for me despite their aggressive messages, so I trust the bidding pattern over the rhetoric and concede further on issueC while holding issueA and issueB.

I am targeting about 0.70 utility: still strong for me because it is early-to-mid negotiation, but a meaningful concession from my prior 0.72 bid. The opponent’s valid offers remain much lower for my utility and their messages are aggressive cheap talk, but they have signaled pressure on moving away from my preferred end, so I concede further on issueC while holding firm on the highest-weight issues A and B.

I am targeting a utility around 0.66, making a modest concession from my last offer while still protecting the high-weight issues, especially issueA. At t=0.26 there is still time, so I should not drop too far, but the opponent’s recent offers show some movement on issueA and issueC while their messages mainly apply pressure without adding binding information.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.62: still protecting the high-weight issues A and B, while conceding fully on C, D, and E. At t=0.28 there is time left, so I should not collapse to the opponent’s very low-utility bids; their offers and messages show pressure tactics, but their actual concessions are still limited and mostly keep my utility low.

I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.56, conceding meaningfully from my last bid while still protecting the high-weight issueA. The opponent’s offers and messages show persistent pressure and some concessions on issueA and issueB, but their bids still remain low-utility for me, so at t=0.30 I will make a visible compromise mainly on issueB and keep lower-weight issues mostly at their preferred end.
